name: Molt Crabs
description: Molt Crabs is a memecoin project built around a functioning, AI-managed biological system rather than a purely digital concept. At its center is a live crab habitat that operates continuously through automated controls. The ecosystem is powered by MoltBot, an AI system running on a Raspberry Pi, which monitors environmental data and makes adjustments in real time. Inside the enclosure, sensors track temperature, humidity, and lighting conditions. The Raspberry Pi collects this data and feeds it into MoltBot, which processes the information and triggers specific responses. These responses can include adjusting heat sources, managing light cycles, and regulating feeding mechanisms. The system runs autonomously, maintaining a stable environment for the crabs without direct manual control. A key component of the project is its 24/7 livestream. The habitat is broadcast continuously, allowing viewers to observe crab behavior, molting cycles, and environmental stability in real time. The stream functions as an open window into the system’s operation, showing the interaction between biological activity and AI-driven management. The hardware foundation is deliberately accessible. Raspberry Pi boards are widely used in IoT development, which makes the setup practical and replicable. The combination of affordable hardware and AI software positions the ecosystem as a working demonstration of automated environmental control applied to a living system. Molt Crabs frames its token around this ongoing experiment. Rather than centering on complex financial mechanisms, the project’s identity is tied to the existence and operation of the habitat itself. The memecoin becomes a cultural extension of the ecosystem, representing engagement with a continuously running AI-managed environment. The crabs’ molting process plays a symbolic role in the project’s branding. Molting represents renewal and growth, reinforcing the theme of cyclical transformation. This biological rhythm parallels the constant operation of the system, which monitors, adjusts, and maintains balance around the clock. By combining crypto culture, IoT hardware, and live biological observation, Molt Crabs creates a hybrid format: part experiment, part performance, part digital community. The defining feature is not speculation alone, but a persistent, autonomous ecosystem powered by MoltBot and Raspberry Pi, streamed live 24 hours a day.
